prompt: Overhead photograph of a single A4 document on a brushed concrete desk surface, the document showing a stylised one-page report layout with a circular badge medallion in deep restrained green (#3a9e62) at the top right, soft directional north light, muted palette, shallow depth of field. Beside the document, a calm matte black object (pen, phone, or coffee cup). No legible text on the document. Editorial, considered, UK office context, photorealistic, 35mm prime. --ar 4:3 --style raw --v 7
surface: Manufacturer outreach emails and verified-rating sales deck
notes: Append --oref <anchor-url> --ow 400 when running. The document stands in for a sample HIP Mark certificate; actual certificates are issued by the pipeline (pipeline/tools/generate_marks.py), never composited from this image.
prompt_modifications: Live prompt diverged from locked v1 during the 2026-04-29 session. See resourcehip_website/brand/GENERATION_LOG.md for the actually-run prompt and the rationale per asset.
